name: Refried Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Chilli powder (or more, or less, or none at all)
1 teaspoon Vecon liquid Vegetable stock (or similar)
2 medium Courgettes, halved and chopped lengthways
1 can Old El-Paso Refried beans (the low fat ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the garlic and onion in water brought to a boil in a saucepan.
2. Add the chillies, cummin, and black pepper and fry until well combined.
3. Add the mushrooms, peppers, vegetable stock, courgettes, and mixed herbs; cook with the lid on until the courgettes begin to soften. Use a low-fat vegetable stock when shopping.
4. Stir in the cans of tomatoes and refried beans.
5. Mash the refried beans into the dish and continue cooking with the lid on until a creamy consistency is achieved.
6. Add the sweetcorn, remove the lid, and stir in enough tomato puree to improve the color of the mixture.
7. The dish should have the creamy consistency of an Indian Korma, slightly thicker if desired. Serve topped with soya yoghurt.
